PowerShell($files = 'extra_A.css','extra_B.css','extra_C.css','extra copy.css','extra copy 2.css','extra copy 3.css'; foreach \($f in $files\) { $diff = Compare-Object \(Get-Content "docs/assets/stylesheets/extra.css"\) \(Get-Content "docs/assets/stylesheets/$f"\); Write-Output "$f -> different lines: $\(@\($diff\).Count\)" })
